title: The First Crack
description:
"Security is just an illusion if the door is ajar."
Investigate my code or the guts of this page. Maybe the flag is hidden where you least expect it.

title: Bomber War
description:
There was a bomber aircraft with a production run of nearly 1,000 units that was decommissioned almost 25 years after its maiden flight.
Could you identify the name of this aircraft and use it as key to decipher this FLAG?
